versions.name: Camp May
versions.summary: Overnight Cub Scout resident camp in High Ridge, Missouri, focused on Wolf and Bear advancement.

provenance.notes: Name corrected 2026-07-22 (community/data-quality review): 'Cub Scout Advancement Camp at Camp May' was a scraped registration-event title; renamed to the property name, verified against the council's camp listing. Prior id 'mo-cub-scout-advancement-camp-at-camp-may' retired (resolves via aliases.json). Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
